snapshot.description: Add AnnotationBubble (draggable floating widget), AnnotationHighlighter (DOM TreeWalker-based), AnnotationSelectionToolbar, AnnotationContext + useAnnotations hook with LocalStorage persistence (500-item cap). Include inline editing with popover textarea + ⌘+Enter save, cross-tab sync via storage events, highlight confidence indicators for non-unique text.
snapshot.title: Implement doc inline annotation system (v0.21.0)
